name: MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited
summary: MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited provides trucking and delivery services using its truckload fleet and subcontractors in the People's Republic of China. The company serves sizeable logistics companies, freight forwarders, and warehouse operators. As of March 5, 2021, it operated a truckload fleet with 114 tractors and 76 trailers. MingZhu Logistics Holdings Limited was founded was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
